hero.heading: Coffee Worth Highlighting
hero.subheading: Specialty-grade beans, precision brewing, and a modern space designed for coffee lovers — right on East Broadway in Glendale.

about.heading: About Highlight
paragraphs: Highlight Coffee is Glendale's destination for specialty coffee. We source single-origin beans from world-class roasters and brew every cup with meticulous care — whether it's a perfectly extracted espresso or a slow-drip pour-over.

Our bright, modern space on East Broadway is built for coffee lovers who appreciate quality. Come for the coffee, stay for the atmosphere. With a 4.6-star rating and nearly 300 five-star reviews, we've become a staple in the Glendale coffee scene.

services.title: Pour-Over & Drip
services.description: Single-origin pour-overs brewed to order, rotating drip selections, and specialty filter methods that bring out every nuance of the bean.

services.title: Espresso Bar
services.description: Expertly pulled espresso shots, silky cortados, flat whites, and classic lattes. Our baristas dial in fresh every morning for peak flavor.

services.title: Cold Drinks
services.description: Smooth cold brew on tap, iced lattes, refreshing matcha, and seasonal specials. The perfect pick-me-up on a warm Glendale afternoon.

services.title: Fresh Pastries
services.description: Locally sourced pastries, cookies, and light bites. Perfectly paired with your drink of choice — baked fresh and delivered daily.

reviews.name: Alex P.
reviews.text: Best specialty coffee in Glendale. The pour-over is incredible — you can taste the difference when beans are this fresh. My daily ritual.

reviews.name: Mia L.
reviews.text: Love the vibe here. Clean, modern space with excellent coffee. The baristas know what they're doing. Highly recommend the cortado.

reviews.name: James W.
reviews.text: Finally, a real specialty coffee shop in Glendale! No burnt beans, no nonsense — just perfectly brewed coffee every single time.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Highlight Coffee, 701 E Broadway, Glendale, CA 91205

seo.title: Highlight Coffee | Specialty Coffee in Glendale, CA
seo.description: Specialty-grade coffee, precision brewing, and a modern space on East Broadway in Glendale. Pour-overs, espresso, cold brew, and more.
